name: Hermann City Park
description:
There is a court marked to use the tennis net and additional marking for using your own net. Please join in if you see anyone on the courts we welcome everyone.

They have 4 permanent pickleball courts in addition to the tennis courts.
open_play_schedule: There is a morning group that plays in the day, time determined by the weather. We play Mon. thru Sat. The evening group plays Tue. & Thur. evenings and Sunday afternoon.
